data.title: Taiwanese Legislator Proposes Bitcoin Allocation from Foreign Exchange Reserves
data.description: Taiwanese legislator Ko Ju-Chun has called on the executive branch to consider allocating a portion of Taiwan's $602 billion foreign exchange reserves to Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Ko also requested the central bank to prepare a report within one month regarding stablecoins and the broader digital asset reserves. This proposal reflects growing interest in integrating digital assets into national financial strategies.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $101 million yesterday, with Fidelity's FETH ETF leading the way with a net inflow of $49.3942 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $101 million yesterday (May 1st, Eastern Time). The Ethereum spot ETF with the largest single-day net inflow was the Fidelity ETF (FETH), with a net inflow of $49.3942 million. FETH's historical total net inflow has reached $2.289 billion. This was followed by the BlackRock ETF (ETHA), with a net inflow of $43.1592 million. ETHA's historical total net outflow has reached $100 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Ethereum spot ETFs is $13.603 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of Ethereum's total market capitalization) of 4.93%. The historical cumulative net inflow has reached $12.016 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $630 million yesterday, with BlackRock's IBIT leading the way with a net inflow of $284 million.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $630 million yesterday (May 1st, Eastern Time). The BlackRock ETF IBIT saw the largest single-day net inflow, at $284 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $327 million. The Fidelity ETF FBTC followed with a net inflow of $213 million, bringing its total historical net inflow to $11.082 billion. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs is $103.785 billion, with an ETF net asset value ratio (market capitalization as a percentage of total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.66%, and a cumulative historical net inflow of $58.718 billion.

data.title: Reform Party leader George Farage has been accused of a conflict of interest after receiving a £5 million grant to push for a crypto tax cut proposal.
data.description: Nigel Farage, leader of the UK's Reform Party, has been accused of a conflict of interest by the opposition. He received a £5 million personal donation from crypto investor Christopher Harborne in 2024. Subsequently, in May 2025, the Reform Party proposed a draft bill to regulate the crypto industry, aiming to reduce the stamp duty on crypto transactions from 24% to 10%, establish a national Bitcoin reserve, and lower capital gains tax on crypto assets. Farage has admitted to receiving the donation, while the Reform Party maintains that policy-making is unrelated to the donor. Furthermore, Harborne donated another £12 million to the party last year, and crypto businessman Ben Delo donated £4 million this year. Farage currently faces charges of violating House of Commons rules, which could result in suspension from his seat and trigger a by-election. (Financial Times)

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Difficulty Decreases by 2.3%
data.description: Bitcoin's mining difficulty has been adjusted at block height 947,520, resulting in a 2.3% decrease to 132.47 T. According to ChainCatcher, the average hash rate across the network over the past seven days is currently 965.99 EH/s.

data.title: Trump Criticizes US Naval Blockade of Iranian Ports as Piracy
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has criticized the recent U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports, likening it to piracy. According to NS3.AI, Trump made these remarks following the seizure of a vessel, its cargo, and its oil a few days ago. He stated that the blockade occurred during the ongoing conflict involving the U.S. and Israel against Iran. In a speech on Friday evening, Trump described the seizure as "a very profitable business."

The event is part of the ongoing developments in the Web3 asset sector, as reported by the data platform RootData.

data.title: Trump likened the US blockade of Iranian ports to piracy: a "very profitable business."
data.description: US President Donald Trump said on Friday that the US Navy's naval blockade of Iranian ports during the US-Israel war against Iran was, in a way, "like piracy." Trump made these remarks while describing the US military's seizure of a ship a few days earlier. "We took over the ship, we took over the cargo, we took over the oil. It's a very profitable business," Trump said in a speech Friday evening. "We were like pirates. A little like pirates, but we weren't playing a game." (Jinshi)

data.title: Polymarket's probability that "the CLARITY Act will officially take effect in 2026" has risen to 67%, a 21% increase in the last 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the probability of Polymarket's "CLARITY Act officially taking effect in 2026" has risen to 67%, a 21% increase in 24 hours. The event's contract rules state: if the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025 (H.R. 3633) is passed and signed into law by both houses of the U.S. Congress before 11:59 PM Eastern Time on December 31, 2026, the result will be "Yes," otherwise "No." The primary sources of information are Congress.gov (https://www.congress.gov/bill/119th-congress/house-bill/3633) and other official U.S. government information, but other reliable reports can also be consulted. Coinbase has stated that a compromise has been reached with traditional banks regarding key disagreements surrounding stablecoin holding yield terms, clearing the way for the U.S. Senate to advance the crypto market structure bill. Previously, banks had lobbied to restrict or prohibit exchanges from offering yields to stablecoin holders, primarily due to concerns about funds flowing out of the banking deposit system. Coinbase Chief Policy Officer Faryar Shirzad stated that while the final proposal adds some restrictions, it still retains the space for users to earn rewards through crypto platforms and networks based on real-world use cases. This development is expected to push the CLARITY bill into the Senate Banking Committee's voting process. Odaily Seer continues to focus on prediction markets, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Billions Network to Launch BILL Token on May 4
data.description: Billions Foundation announced that the digital identity verification platform, Billions Network, will conduct the Token Generation Event (TGE) for its BILL token on May 4. According to Foresight News, this event marks a significant step for the platform in expanding its digital identity services.

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Trump: Progress made in Iran negotiations, but not enough; 2. Paradigm researchers propose a timestamp escape mechanism to protect early Bitcoin from quantum computing threats; 3. Trump tells US Congress the conflict with Iran is over, circumventing the war authorization process; 4. Ethereum Foundation sells another 10,000 ETH via OTC, bringing the total to 30,000 in the past month and a half; 5. Coinbase: Has reached a compromise with banks on stablecoin yield terms, Senate crypto bill imminent; 6. Anchorage Digital submits a comment letter to the GENIUS Act, planning to issue the stablecoin UDSPT with Western Union; 7. After the Manus acquisition plan was halted, several Chinese AI companies are assessing dismantling their red-chip structure to advance their Hong Kong IPOs; 8. a16z supports the CFTC, saying state regulations will weaken prediction market liquidity; 9. Curve launches a "bad debt" recovery mechanism, allowing damaged claims to exit through trading or participate in repair; 10. Tether releases Q1 financial report: quarterly profit of $1.04 billion, excess reserves reach $8.23 billion, a new all-time high; 11. Payment infrastructure company Fun completed a $72 million Series A funding round, led by Multicoin Capital and SignalFire; 12. Funding in the crypto sector in April plummeted 74% month-on-month to $659 million, a near two-year low.

data.title: Asset classes showed mixed performance, with crude oil falling by more than 3% and European stock indices generally rising.
data.description: According to the latest data from Gate, gold prices fell to $4,614.46 per ounce, a daily decrease of 0.15%. Silver prices fell to $75.313 per ounce, a daily increase of 2.18%. The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 40.20, a daily decrease of 2.19%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 55.05, a daily decrease of 5.90%. In the foreign exchange market, the USD/CNH exchange rate fell 0.02% to 6.82963. The USD/JPY exchange rate rose 0.28% to 157.063. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 1.61% to 5,883.42 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.06% to 10,359.82 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 1.89% to 24,286.35 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 3.05% to $104.55 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 2.16% to $114.50 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose at the close of trading in the US, with CRCL surging over 9.7%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.31%, the S&P 500 rose 0.29%, and the Nasdaq Composite rose 0.89%. Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose, with CRCL up over 9.7%, MSTR up 7.08%, ABTC up 5.22%, COIN up 1.85%, and MARA down 4.42%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Czech Central Bank Governor Advocates Bitcoin Allocation for Portfolio Diversification
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter). At the Bitcoin Conference 2026, the Governor of the Czech Central Bank shared intriguing research findings, suggesting that incorporating 1% Bitcoin into a model investment portfolio could enhance expected returns while maintaining overall risk levels. He also recounted a personal anecdote from ten years ago when he purchased a cup of coffee in Prague using Bitcoin, which would be valued at approximately $350 today, highlighting the significant appreciation of the cryptocurrency. Beyond this anecdote, the focus is on Bitcoin's transition from a highly volatile speculative asset to a topic of discussion in central bank and traditional finance asset allocation strategies.

data.title: New Wallet Withdraws Significant Bitcoin Amount from CEX
data.description: On May 2, a newly created wallet withdrew 1,051 BTC from a centralized exchange (CEX), according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. This transaction is valued at approximately $82.37 million. The movement of such a substantial amount of Bitcoin has drawn attention within the cryptocurrency community, highlighting ongoing interest in large-scale transactions and their potential impact on the market.

data.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Returns to Twitter
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has announced his return to Twitter, expressing his pleasure in being back on the platform. According to Odaily, Altman shared his thoughts on the social media site, stating that the ability to waste time can also provide comfort.

data.title: Polymarket Odds for CLARITY Act Passing in 2026 Rise Above 60%
data.description: Polymarket odds for the CLARITY Act passing in 2026 have increased to over 60%. According to NS3.AI, this change comes after a compromise was reached regarding stablecoin revenue sharing.
